text:
I'll search for this paper using the exact title to verify whether it exists.
The paper has been found. The web search results show that the paper exists on arXiv with the title "WAPITI: A Watermark for Finetuned Open-Source LLMs" (note the capitalization differs from the cited version). The arXiv page shows the authors as Lingjie Chen, Ruizhong Qiu, Siyu Yuan, Zhining Liu, Tianxin Wei, Hyunsik Yoo, Zhichen Zeng, Deqing Yang, and Hanghang Tong. Let me verify the exact title and author match more carefully.

Looking at search result index 1, the arXiv abstract page shows:
- Title: "WAPITI: A Watermark for Finetuned Open-Source LLMs"
- Authors: "Lingjie Chen, Ruizhong Qiu, Siyu Yuan, Zhining Liu, Tianxin Wei, Hyunsik Yoo, Zhichen Zeng, Deqing Yang, Hanghang Tong"

The cited reference has:
- Title: "W APITI: a watermark for finetuned open-source LLMs" (with a space between W and APITI, and lowercase "a")
- Authors: "Lingjie Chen, Ruizhong Qiu, Siyu Yuan, Zhining Liu, Tianxin Wei, Hyunsik Yoo, Zhichen Zeng, Deqing Yang"

The title has a formatting error (space in "W APITI" instead of "WAPITI"), and the author list is missing Hanghang Tong. However, these are minor discrepancies that appear to be citation formatting or truncation errors rather than hallucinations of the entire reference.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists on arXiv (2410.06467) with the exact authors and general content match, though the cited title has a formatting error (space in "W APITI") and the final author Hanghang Tong is omitted from the cited author list.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.06467
FOUND_TITLE: WAPITI: A Watermark for Finetuned Open-Source LLMs
FOUND_AUTHORS: Lingjie Chen, Ruizhong Qiu, Siyu Yuan, Zhining Liu, Tianxin Wei, Hyunsik Yoo, Zhichen Zeng, Deqing Yang, Hanghang Tong
